rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE LEANDRUS BENTON SR, DECEASED SEPTEMBER 9, 2010
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Application Motion For Order To Consolidate Cases Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Of Motion Proposed Order
rulings.Rulings: Petitioner's Motion to Consolidate these actions in the Probate Court is denied, without prejudice as to filing a motion to consolidate in the related civil case. The parties are encouraged to engage in mediation. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing at the scheduled hearing must so advise the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) and opposing parties no later than 4:00 p.m. Tuesday, August 1, 2017.
